diagnosis.root_cause: The pipeline needs a reference genome that is not on this machine and would be downloaded into the work dir.
evidence: No fasta found for GRCh38 under the configured igenomes_base.

patch.rationale: Fetch the GRCh38 reference and re-run; this overwrites the existing partial reference directory.
patch.expected_signal: The reference is present and STAR_GENOMEGENERATE completes.
